-- 全量覆盖写入维表
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_ec.tmp_dim_ec_user_da;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tmp_ec.tmp_dim_ec_user_da AS
SELECT
     t.user_id
     t.username
     t.phone
     t.email
     t.gender
     t.age_range
     t.vip_level
     t.register_time
     t.register_channel
     t.is_active

     t.province_name

WHERE dt = '${dt}'

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
     t.user_id
     t.username
     t.phone
     t.email
     t.gender
     t.age_range
     t.vip_level
     t.register_time
     t.register_channel
     t.is_active
     t.last_login_time
     t.city_id
     t.city_name
     t.province_name
     t.region_name
FROM tmp_ec.tmp_dim_ec_user_da;

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: zhaolei zhaolei@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2021-12-25
-- **代码描述: DWD层order业务宽表清洗
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhaolei zhaolei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** ods_ec.ods_ec_order_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_region_da
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_channel_da
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_order_basic_di
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;

-- 获取最新维表分区
SET latest_dim_dt = (
    SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_region_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}'
);

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dwd_ec_order_basic_di
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    -- 订单基础信息清洗
    o.order_id,
    o.user_id,
    o.shop_id,
    o.product_id,
    o.sku_id,
    CASE o.order_status
        WHEN '0' THEN '待付款'
        WHEN '1' THEN '已付款'
        WHEN '2' THEN '已发货'
        WHEN '3' THEN '已完成'
        WHEN '4' THEN '已取消'
        ELSE '未知'
    END                                              AS order_status_desc,
    o.order_status,
    o.order_amount,
    o.discount_amount,
    o.actual_amount,
    COALESCE(o.actual_amount, 0)                     AS actual_amount_clean,
    COALESCE(o.order_amount - o.discount_amount, 0)  AS net_amount,
    o.order_time,
    o.pay_time,
    o.finish_time,
    o.cancel_time,
    DATEDIFF(o.finish_time, o.order_time)            AS order_cycle_days,
    o.source_type,
    o.platform,
    o.region_id,
    r.region_name,
    r.province_name,
    r.city_name,
    o.channel_id,
    c.channel_name,
    c.channel_type,
    u.username,
    u.vip_level,
    u.age_range,
    u.gender,
    '${dt}'                                        AS dt
FROM ods_ec.ods_ec_order_di o
LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_region_da  r ON o.region_id  = r.region_id  AND r.dt = '${latest_dim_dt}'
LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_channel_da c ON o.channel_id = c.channel_id AND c.dt = '${latest_dim_dt}'
LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da    u ON o.user_id    = u.user_id    AND u.dt = '${latest_dim_dt}'
WHERE o.dt = '${dt}'
  AND o.order_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建人: zhaolei zhaolei@ecommerce.com

-- **修改历史:

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** ods_ec.ods_ec_pay_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;

-- 获取最新维表分区
SET latest_dim_dt = (
    SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_region_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}'
);

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    -- 支付基础信息清洗
    p.pay_id,
    p.order_id,
    p.user_id,
    p.pay_channel,
    CASE p.pay_channel
        WHEN 'alipay'  THEN '支付宝'
        WHEN 'wechat'  THEN '微信支付'
        WHEN 'bank'    THEN '银行卡'
        ELSE '其他'
    END                                               AS pay_channel_desc,
    p.pay_amount,
    NVL(p.pay_amount, 0)                             AS pay_amount_clean,
    p.pay_currency,
    CASE p.pay_currency
        WHEN 'CNY'  THEN p.pay_amount
        WHEN 'USD'  THEN p.pay_amount * 7.2
        ELSE p.pay_amount
    END                                               AS pay_amount_cny,
    p.pay_status,
    CASE p.pay_status
        WHEN '0' THEN '待支付'
        WHEN '1' THEN '支付成功'
        WHEN '2' THEN '支付失败'
        WHEN '3' THEN '已退款'
        ELSE '未知'
    END                                               AS pay_status_desc,
    p.pay_time,
    p.refund_amount,
    NVL(p.refund_amount, 0)                          AS refund_amount_clean,
    p.refund_time,
    p.third_party_no,
    u.vip_level,
    u.register_channel,
    '${dt}'                                        AS dt
FROM ods_ec.ods_ec_pay_di p
LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da    u ON o.user_id    = u.user_id    AND u.dt = '${latest_dim_dt}'
WHERE p.dt = '${dt}'
  AND p.pay_id IS NOT NULL;

SELECT
    -- 订单基础信息清洗
    o.order_id,
    o.user_id,
    o.shop_id,
    o.product_id,
    o.sku_id,
    CASE o.order_status
        WHEN '0' THEN '待付款'
        WHEN '1' THEN '已付款'
        WHEN '2' THEN '已发货'
        WHEN '3' THEN '已完成'
        WHEN '4' THEN '已取消'
        ELSE '未知'
    END                                              AS order_status_desc,
    o.order_status,
    o.order_amount,
    o.discount_amount,
    o.actual_amount,
    COALESCE(o.actual_amount, 0)                     AS actual_amount_clean,
    COALESCE(o.order_amount - o.discount_amount, 0)  AS net_amount,
    o.order_time,
    o.pay_time,
    o.finish_time,
    o.cancel_time,
    DATEDIFF(o.finish_time, o.order_time)            AS order_cycle_days,
    o.source_type,
    o.platform,
    o.region_id,
    r.region_name,
    r.province_name,
    r.city_name,
    o.channel_id,
    c.channel_name,
    c.channel_type,
    u.username,
    u.vip_level,
    u.age_range,
    u.gender,
    '${dt}'                                        AS dt
FROM ods_ec.ods_ec_vip_upgrade_di v
LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da    u ON o.user_id    = u.user_id    AND u.dt = '${latest_dim_dt}'
WHERE v.dt = '${dt}'
  AND v.user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设

-- **修改历史:

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_rolling_di
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_rolling_di
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    -- 近7天
    SUM(paid_order_cnt)  OVER w7                    AS paid_order_cnt_7d,
    SUM(paid_amount)     OVER w7                    AS paid_amount_7d,
    -- 近30天
    SUM(paid_order_cnt)  OVER w30                   AS paid_order_cnt_30d,
    SUM(paid_amount)     OVER w30                   AS paid_amount_30d,
    -- 近90天
    SUM(paid_order_cnt)  OVER w90                   AS paid_order_cnt_90d,
    SUM(paid_amount)     OVER w90                   AS paid_amount_90d,
    -- 用户首单时间
    MIN(first_order_time) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY dt ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ever_first_order_time,
    -- 当日
    paid_order_cnt                                  AS paid_order_cnt_1d,
    paid_amount                                     AS paid_amount_1d,
    dt
FROM dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 90) AND '${dt}'
WINDOW
    w7  AS (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY dt ROWS BETWEEN 6  PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
    w30 AS (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY dt ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW),
    w90 AS (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY dt ROWS BETWEEN 89 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW);

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_pay_result_di
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_pay_result_di
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    -- 用户支付结果宽表
    u.user_id,
    u.username,
    u.vip_level,
    u.gender,
    u.age_range,
    u.city_name,
    u.province_name,
    -- 订单汇总
    NVL(o.order_cnt, 0)                              AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.paid_order_cnt, 0)                         AS paid_order_cnt,
    NVL(o.paid_amount, 0)                            AS paid_order_amount,
    NVL(o.cancel_order_cnt, 0)                       AS cancel_order_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_order_amount, 0)                       AS avg_order_amount,
    -- 支付汇总
    NVL(p.pay_cnt, 0)                                AS pay_cnt,
    NVL(p.success_cnt, 0)                            AS pay_success_cnt,
    NVL(p.fail_cnt, 0)                               AS pay_fail_cnt,
    NVL(p.success_amount_cny, 0)                     AS pay_amount_cny,
    NVL(p.refund_amount, 0)                          AS refund_amount,
    NVL(p.refund_cnt, 0)                             AS refund_cnt,
    NVL(p.avg_pay_amount, 0)                         AS avg_pay_amount,
    -- 派生指标
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.order_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.paid_order_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.order_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                              AS pay_rate,
    CASE WHEN NVL(p.pay_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(p.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / p.pay_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                              AS pay_success_rate,
    '${dt}'  AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da p
LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_category_da c ON p.category_id = c.category_id AND c.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_category_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}')
LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_brand_da    b ON p.brand_id    = b.brand_id    AND b.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_brand_da    WHERE dt <= '${dt}')
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di   s ON p.product_id = s.product_id  AND s.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE p.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: yangmin yangmin@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-04-18
-- **代码描述: ADS层user_rfm_score指标计算
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: yangmin yangmin@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_pay_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.ads_ec_user_user_rfm_score_di
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.ads_ec_user_user_rfm_score_di
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    -- 用户 RFM 打分模型
    user_id,
    username,
    vip_level,
    -- R: Recency 最近购买距今天数
    DATEDIFF('${dt}', last_order_time)             AS recency_days,
    CASE
        WHEN DATEDIFF('${dt}', last_order_time) <= 7  THEN 5
        WHEN DATEDIFF('${dt}', last_order_time) <= 30 THEN 4
        WHEN DATEDIFF('${dt}', last_order_time) <= 90 THEN 3
        WHEN DATEDIFF('${dt}', last_order_time) <= 180 THEN 2
        ELSE 1
    END                                              AS recency_score,
    -- F: Frequency 累计购买次数（近90天）
    paid_order_cnt_90d,
    CASE
        WHEN paid_order_cnt_90d >= 20 THEN 5
        WHEN paid_order_cnt_90d >= 10 THEN 4
        WHEN paid_order_cnt_90d >= 5  THEN 3
        WHEN paid_order_cnt_90d >= 2  THEN 2
        ELSE 1
    END                                              AS frequency_score,
    -- M: Monetary 消费金额（近90天）
    pay_amount_90d,
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount_90d >= 10000 THEN 5
        WHEN pay_amount_90d >= 5000  THEN 4
        WHEN pay_amount_90d >= 1000  THEN 3
        WHEN pay_amount_90d >= 300   THEN 2
        ELSE 1
    END                                              AS monetary_score,
    -- 综合 RFM 分数
    (
        CASE WHEN DATEDIFF('${dt}', last_order_time) <= 30 THEN 5 ELSE 1 END * 0.3 +
        CASE WHEN paid_order_cnt_90d >= 5 THEN 5 ELSE paid_order_cnt_90d END * 0.3 +
        CASE WHEN pay_amount_90d >= 1000 THEN 5 ELSE 1 END * 0.4
    )                                                AS rfm_score,
    -- 用户分层
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount_90d >= 10000 AND paid_order_cnt_90d >= 10 THEN '高价值用户'
        WHEN pay_amount_90d >= 1000  AND paid_order_cnt_90d >= 3  THEN '中价值用户'
        WHEN pay_amount_90d > 0                                   THEN '低价值用户'
        WHEN last_order_time IS NOT NULL                          THEN '流失风险用户'
        ELSE '未购买用户'
    END                                              AS user_segment,
    '${dt}'  AS dt
FROM (
    SELECT
        a.user_id,
        a.username,
        a.vip_level,
        a.pay_amount_cny                              AS pay_amount_90d,
        a.paid_order_cnt                              AS paid_order_cnt_90d,
        b.last_order_time
    FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_pay_result_di a
    LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di b
           ON a.user_id = b.user_id
          AND b.dt      = '${dt}'
    WHERE a.dt = '${dt}'
) t;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.ads_ec_shop_shop_daily_kpi_di
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    -- 店铺每日 KPI 大盘
    shop_id,
    shop_name,
    shop_type,
    category_id,
    province_name,
    -- 当日核心指标
    order_cnt,
    buyer_cnt,
    paid_order_cnt,
    paid_buyer_cnt,
    gmv,
    net_gmv,
    refund_amount,
    refund_cnt,
    total_discount,
    CASE WHEN order_cnt > 0 THEN paid_order_cnt * 1.0 / order_cnt ELSE 0 END AS order_pay_rate,
    CASE WHEN gmv > 0 THEN refund_amount * 1.0 / gmv ELSE 0 END              AS refund_rate,
    CASE WHEN buyer_cnt > 0 THEN gmv * 1.0 / buyer_cnt ELSE 0 END            AS arpu,
    -- 环比（与昨日对比，关联 lag 数据）
    NVL(gmv, 0) - NVL(gmv_yesterday, 0)             AS gmv_mom_diff,
    CASE WHEN NVL(gmv_yesterday, 0) > 0
         THEN (NVL(gmv, 0) - NVL(gmv_yesterday, 0)) / gmv_yesterday
         ELSE NULL
    END                                              AS gmv_mom_rate,
    '${dt}'  AS dt
FROM (
    SELECT
        t1.*,
        t2.gmv AS gmv_yesterday
    FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_shop_gmv_result_di t1
    LEFT JOIN dm_ec.dwa_ec_shop_gmv_result_di t2
           ON t1.shop_id = t2.shop_id
          AND t2.dt      = DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1)
    WHERE t1.dt = '${dt}'
) t;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.ads_ec_pay_pay_channel_analysis_di

-- **创建人: wangfang wangfang@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-08-13
-- **代码描述: ADS层电商转化漏斗分析
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: wangfang wangfang@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_session_basic_di
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_order_basic_di
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.ads_ec_funnel_order_funnel_analysis_di
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.ads_ec_funnel_order_funnel_analysis_di
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    channel_id,
    channel_name,
    platform,
    -- 各漏斗层级用户数
    COUNT(DISTINCT visit_user_id)                    AS visit_uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT search_user_id)                   AS search_uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT add_cart_user_id)                 AS add_cart_uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT create_order_user_id)             AS create_order_uv,
    COUNT(DISTINCT pay_user_id)                      AS pay_uv,
    -- 各层转化率
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT visit_user_id) > 0
         THEN COUNT(DISTINCT search_user_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT visit_user_id)
         ELSE 0
    END                                              AS visit_to_search_rate,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT search_user_id) > 0
         THEN COUNT(DISTINCT add_cart_user_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT search_user_id)
         ELSE 0
    END                                              AS search_to_cart_rate,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT add_cart_user_id) > 0
         THEN COUNT(DISTINCT create_order_user_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT add_cart_user_id)
         ELSE 0
    END                                              AS cart_to_order_rate,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT create_order_user_id) > 0
         THEN COUNT(DISTINCT pay_user_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT create_order_user_id)
         ELSE 0
    END                                              AS order_to_pay_rate,
    -- 整体转化率
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT visit_user_id) > 0
         THEN COUNT(DISTINCT pay_user_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT visit_user_id)
         ELSE 0
    END                                              AS overall_cvr,
    '${dt}'  AS dt
FROM (
    SELECT
        s.channel_id,
        c.channel_name,
        s.platform,
        s.user_id                                    AS visit_user_id,
        sr.user_id                                   AS search_user_id,
        ct.user_id                                   AS add_cart_user_id,
        o.user_id                                    AS create_order_user_id,
        p.user_id                                    AS pay_user_id
    FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_session_basic_di       s
    LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_channel_da       c  ON s.channel_id    = c.channel_id
    LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dwd_ec_search_basic_di   sr ON s.user_id       = sr.user_id   AND sr.dt = '${dt}'
    LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dwd_ec_cart_basic_di     ct ON s.user_id       = ct.user_id   AND ct.dt = '${dt}'
    LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dwd_ec_order_basic_di    o  ON s.user_id       = o.user_id    AND o.dt  = '${dt}'
    LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di      p  ON s.user_id       = p.user_id    AND p.dt  = '${dt}'
                                                AND p.pay_status   = '1'
    WHERE s.dt = '${dt}'
) t
GROUP BY channel_id, channel_name, platform;

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: luxia luxia@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-03-13
-- **代码描述: ADS层用户Cohort留存分析
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: luxia luxia@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.ads_ec_user_cohort_retention_di_di
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.ads_ec_user_cohort_retention_di_di
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    register_dt,
    cohort_size,
    retention_day,
    retained_user_cnt,
    CASE WHEN cohort_size > 0
         THEN retained_user_cnt * 1.0 / cohort_size
         ELSE 0
    END                                              AS retention_rate,
    '${dt}'  AS dt
FROM (
    SELECT
        u.register_dt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id)                    AS cohort_size,
        DATEDIFF(o.dt, u.register_dt)                AS retention_day,
        COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id)                    AS retained_user_cnt
    FROM (
        SELECT
            user_id,
            regexp_replace(substr(register_time, 1, 10), '-', '') AS register_dt
        FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
        WHERE dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}')
          AND register_time >= DATE_SUB('${dt}', 90)
    ) u
    LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di o
           ON u.user_id = o.user_id
          AND o.dt BETWEEN u.register_dt AND '${dt}'
          AND o.paid_order_cnt > 0
    GROUP BY u.register_dt, DATEDIFF(o.dt, u.register_dt)
    HAVING DATEDIFF(o.dt, u.register_dt) BETWEEN 0 AND 30
) t;

PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')

    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,

    net_amount,

    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt

  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,

-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_region_day_di_v85
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_region_day_di_v85
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    region_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1) AND '${dt}'
  AND region_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY region_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_user_category_insight_di_v36
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **代码描述: DWS层pay按user_week汇总v88
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: liujuan liujuan@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_week_di_v88
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_week_di_v88
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY user_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_retention_result_di_v85
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_retention_result_di_v85
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_order_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设

-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_roi_result_di_v58
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_roi_result_di_v58
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_flash_sale_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1) AND '${dt}'
  AND region_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY region_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_logistics_revenue_result_di_v61
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建人: luxia luxia@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-08-10
-- **代码描述: APP层payalert_monitor指标v89
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: luxia luxia@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_pay_alert_monitor_di_v89
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_pay_alert_monitor_di_v89
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_retention_result_di_v80
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,

-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- ** app_ec.app_ec_inventory_weekly_summary_di_v92
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_inventory_weekly_summary_di_v92
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,

    CASE

        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: tangfei tangfei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_activity_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_activity_shop_month_di_v31
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_activity_shop_month_di_v31
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    shop_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_activity_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 30) AND '${dt}'
  AND shop_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY shop_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com

-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_recommend_churn_result_di_v2
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_recommend_churn_result_di_v2
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建人: songbo songbo@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-07-16
-- **代码描述: APP层cartrealtime_board指标v54
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: songbo songbo@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_cart_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_cart_realtime_board_di_v54
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_cart_realtime_board_di_v54
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt

PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')

    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_user_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_user_user_month_di_v89
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_user_user_month_di_v89
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_user_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 30) AND '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY user_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- ** app_ec.app_ec_logistics_campaign_report_di_v18
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_logistics_campaign_report_di_v18
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_logistics_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **维护人: songbo songbo@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_retention_result_di_v8
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_retention_result_di_v8
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **维护人: liujuan liujuan@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_category_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_category_ab_test_result_di_v10
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_category_ab_test_result_di_v10
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_category_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_ad_click_category_week_di_v72
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_ad_click_category_week_di_v72
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    category_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_ad_click_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND category_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_review_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_review_retention_result_di_v61
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_review_retention_result_di_v61
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_review_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_review_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: linpeng linpeng@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_order_weekly_summary_di_v97
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_order_weekly_summary_di_v97
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建人: zhengyong zhengyong@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-04-26
-- **代码描述: DWS层pay按product_week汇总v23
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhengyong zhengyong@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_product_week_di_v23
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_product_week_di_v23
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    product_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_pay_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND product_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY product_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_vip_upgrade_weekly_summary_di_v73
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,

  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_product_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_product_product_week_di_v63
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_product_product_week_di_v63
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    product_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_product_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND product_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY product_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_performance_result_di_v15
-- **

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_performance_result_di_v15
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,

         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d

SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_cost_result_di_v96
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,

-- **创建人: zhaolei zhaolei@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-07-27
-- **代码描述: DWA层productrevenue_result宽表v29
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhaolei zhaolei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_revenue_result_di_v29
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_revenue_result_di_v29
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_order_growth_analysis_di_v95
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,

        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: zhangwei zhangwei@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-08-24
-- **代码描述: DWS层cart按shop_week汇总v6
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhangwei zhangwei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_cart_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_shop_week_di_v6
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_shop_week_di_v6
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    shop_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_cart_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND shop_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY shop_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: tangfei tangfei@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-09-13
-- **代码描述: DWA层inventorygrowth_result宽表v4
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: tangfei tangfei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_growth_result_di_v4
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_growth_result_di_v4
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设

-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_cost_result_di_v88
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_cost_result_di_v88
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_vip_upgrade_cost_result_di_v87
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'

-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_vip_upgrade_realtime_board_di_v56
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_vip_upgrade_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建时间: 2023-05-13
-- **代码描述: APP层productcategory_insight指标v51
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: liujuan liujuan@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_product_category_insight_di_v51
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_product_category_insight_di_v51
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- ** app_ec.app_ec_search_daily_report_di_v26
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_search_daily_report_di_v26
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_search_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建人: luxia luxia@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-12-18
-- **代码描述: DWA层flash_salegrowth_result宽表v3
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: luxia luxia@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_growth_result_di_v3
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_growth_result_di_v3
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_ad_click_user_month_di_v22
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_ad_click_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 30) AND '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY user_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_review_revenue_result_di_v55
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,

         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_review_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_review_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_growth_result_di_v18
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_growth_result_di_v18
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_vip_upgrade_churn_result_di_v82
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_category_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_category_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_category_roi_result_di_v52
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_category_roi_result_di_v52
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_category_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_category_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_cart_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_user_month_di_v10
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_user_month_di_v10
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_cart_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 30) AND '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY user_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_user_campaign_report_di_v43
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_cart_roi_result_di_v60
-- **

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_cart_roi_result_di_v60
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建人: tangfei tangfei@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-10-14
-- **代码描述: DWA层shopgrowth_result宽表v86
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: tangfei tangfei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_shop_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_shop_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_shop_growth_result_di_v86
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_shop_growth_result_di_v86
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_shop_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_shop_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')

    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,

WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_coupon_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **

-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_coupon_ab_test_result_di_v59
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,

    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'

        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt

WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;
