-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_cart_performance_result_di_v40
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_cart_performance_result_di_v40
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_cart_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **修改历史:

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_user_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_user_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_risk_result_di_v55
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_risk_result_di_v55
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_user_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_user_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_pay_realtime_board_di_v64
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,

    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,

    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'

        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_pay_alert_monitor_di_v96
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_pay_alert_monitor_di_v96
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: wuqiang wuqiang@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-05-15
-- **代码描述: DWA层refundrisk_result宽表v13
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: wuqiang wuqiang@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_refund_risk_result_di_v13
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_refund_risk_result_di_v13
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_flash_sale_campaign_report_di_v60
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,

    CASE

        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_refund_retention_result_di_v48
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_refund_retention_result_di_v48
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,

         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

    region_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,

  AND region_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY region_id

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_revenue_result_di_v82
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_revenue_result_di_v82
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_vip_upgrade_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_platform_day_di_v15
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_platform_day_di_v15
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    platform_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_vip_upgrade_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1) AND '${dt}'
  AND platform_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY platform_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **

-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_category_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- ** app_ec.app_ec_category_monthly_kpi_di_v35
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_category_monthly_kpi_di_v35
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,

    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_category_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_ad_click_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_ad_click_ab_test_result_di_v8
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_ad_click_ab_test_result_di_v8
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_ad_click_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,

SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_month_di_v10
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    shop_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,

-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_inventory_alert_monitor_di_v87
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_inventory_alert_monitor_di_v87
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **代码描述: DWS层vip_upgrade按shop_week汇总v82
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhoujing zhoujing@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_vip_upgrade_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_shop_week_di_v82
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_shop_week_di_v82
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    shop_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_vip_upgrade_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND shop_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY shop_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **代码描述: APP层recommendrealtime_board指标v9
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: hexin hexin@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_recommend_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_recommend_realtime_board_di_v9
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_recommend_realtime_board_di_v9
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_recommend_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_brand_alert_monitor_di_v86
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_brand_alert_monitor_di_v86
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_session_weekly_summary_di_v37
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,

    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,

-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_conversion_result_di_v23
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_conversion_result_di_v23
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_pay_daily_report_di_v80
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,

    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建人: yangmin yangmin@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-07-27
-- **代码描述: DWA层payrisk_result宽表v82
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: yangmin yangmin@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_risk_result_di_v82
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_risk_result_di_v82
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建时间: 2023-02-19
-- **代码描述: APP层refunddaily_report指标v78
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhoujing zhoujing@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_refund_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_refund_daily_report_di_v78
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_refund_daily_report_di_v78
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_refund_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: tangfei tangfei@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-11-10
-- **代码描述: DWA层brandconversion_result宽表v18
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: tangfei tangfei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_conversion_result_di_v18
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_conversion_result_di_v18
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建时间: 2023-09-16
-- **代码描述: DWA层paycost_result宽表v66
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhoujing zhoujing@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_cost_result_di_v66
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_cost_result_di_v66
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建人: zhengyong zhengyong@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-06-13
-- **代码描述: DWA层flash_salerisk_result宽表v95
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhengyong zhengyong@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_risk_result_di_v95
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_risk_result_di_v95
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_flash_sale_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建时间: 2023-10-16
-- **代码描述: APP层orderab_test_result指标v69
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: tangfei tangfei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_order_ab_test_result_di_v69
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_order_ab_test_result_di_v69
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_shop_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_shop_category_insight_di_v86
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_shop_category_insight_di_v86
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_shop_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_recommend_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_platform_day_di_v87
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_platform_day_di_v87
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    platform_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_recommend_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1) AND '${dt}'
  AND platform_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY platform_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_churn_result_di_v52
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_churn_result_di_v52
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: songbo songbo@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_activity_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_activity_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_activity_churn_result_di_v98
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_activity_churn_result_di_v98
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_activity_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_activity_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_coupon_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_coupon_cost_result_di_v12
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_coupon_cost_result_di_v12
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_coupon_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_coupon_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_vip_upgrade_weekly_summary_di_v35
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,

    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,

    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_vip_upgrade_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,

-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_vip_upgrade_conversion_result_di_v92
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_vip_upgrade_conversion_result_di_v92
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da

-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_logistics_ltv_result_di_v93
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_logistics_ltv_result_di_v93
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_category_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_category_churn_result_di_v66
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_category_churn_result_di_v66
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_category_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_category_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-06-19
-- **代码描述: APP层searchgrowth_analysis指标v25
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_search_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_search_growth_analysis_di_v25
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_search_growth_analysis_di_v25
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_search_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_flash_sale_realtime_board_di_v54
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_flash_sale_realtime_board_di_v54
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_flash_sale_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_conversion_result_di_v37
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_brand_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'

-- **代码描述: DWA层recommendrisk_result宽表v57
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: linpeng linpeng@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_recommend_risk_result_di_v57
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_recommend_risk_result_di_v57
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_recommend_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-04-22
-- **代码描述: APP层payab_test_result指标v64
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_pay_ab_test_result_di_v64
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_pay_ab_test_result_di_v64
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,

  AND channel_id IS NOT NULL

-- **维护人: wangfang wangfang@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_vip_upgrade_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_vip_day_di_v5
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_vip_day_di_v5
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    vip_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_vip_upgrade_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1) AND '${dt}'
  AND vip_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY vip_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: gaoyan gaoyan@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_logistics_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_shop_week_di_v24
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_shop_week_di_v24
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    shop_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_logistics_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND shop_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY shop_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- ** app_ec.app_ec_coupon_weekly_summary_di_v7
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_coupon_weekly_summary_di_v7
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_coupon_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建时间: 2023-08-13
-- **代码描述: DWA层refundgrowth_result宽表v79
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: zhangwei zhangwei@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_refund_growth_result_di_v79
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_refund_growth_result_di_v79
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_refund_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_performance_result_di_v44
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_performance_result_di_v44
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-02-24
-- **代码描述: DWA层productrevenue_result宽表v83
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_revenue_result_di_v83
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_revenue_result_di_v83
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_performance_result_di_v44
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_performance_result_di_v44
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设

-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_risk_result_di_v22
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_risk_result_di_v22
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_review_growth_analysis_di_v16
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,

    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,

        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_review_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **代码描述: APP层ad_clickmonthly_kpi指标v99
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: sunhui sunhui@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_ad_click_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_ad_click_monthly_kpi_di_v99
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_ad_click_monthly_kpi_di_v99
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_ad_click_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **代码描述: DWA层searchcost_result宽表v43
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: dongna dongna@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_search_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_search_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_search_cost_result_di_v43
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_search_cost_result_di_v43
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_search_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_search_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_review_shop_week_di_v7
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    shop_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,

    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_review_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND shop_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY shop_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **创建人: chengang chengang@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-02-15
-- **代码描述: DWA层inventoryretention_result宽表v23
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: chengang chengang@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_retention_result_di_v23
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_inventory_retention_result_di_v23
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_search_risk_result_di_v52
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')

    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,

LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_search_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_search_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'

    d.gender,

-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_vip_upgrade_roi_result_di_v27
-- **

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_vip_upgrade_roi_result_di_v27
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_vip_upgrade_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **创建时间: 2023-03-19

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: songbo songbo@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_category_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_category_shop_week_di_v30
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_category_shop_week_di_v30
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    shop_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_category_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND shop_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY shop_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;
