-- **创建人: liming liming@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-06-23
-- **代码描述: DWA层logisticsconversion_result宽表v15
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: liming liming@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_logistics_conversion_result_di_v15
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_logistics_conversion_result_di_v15
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_logistics_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_product_risk_result_di_v98
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,

    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_product_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **代码描述: APP层paydaily_report指标v47
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: liming liming@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_pay_daily_report_di_v47
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_pay_daily_report_di_v47
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建人: liujuan liujuan@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-04-26
-- **代码描述: DWS层coupon按platform_day汇总v92
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: liujuan liujuan@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_coupon_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_coupon_platform_day_di_v92
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_coupon_platform_day_di_v92
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    platform_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_coupon_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1) AND '${dt}'
  AND platform_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY platform_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_coupon_user_portrait_di_v59
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_coupon_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_user_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_user_platform_day_di_v94
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_user_platform_day_di_v94
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    platform_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_user_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1) AND '${dt}'
  AND platform_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY platform_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_growth_result_di_v5
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_growth_result_di_v5
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: liujuan liujuan@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_brand_daily_report_di_v13
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_brand_daily_report_di_v13
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_brand_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **修改历史:

-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:

-- ** app_ec.app_ec_user_category_insight_di_v12
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_user_category_insight_di_v12
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **代码描述: DWA层reviewcost_result宽表v92
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: linpeng linpeng@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_review_user_day_di
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_review_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_review_cost_result_di_v92
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_review_cost_result_di_v92
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_review_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_review_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_activity_cost_result_di_v36
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_activity_cost_result_di_v36
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_activity_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_activity_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di
-- ** dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_risk_result_di_v43
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_pay_risk_result_di_v43
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,
    CASE WHEN NVL(o.record_cnt, 0) > 0
         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_pay_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_product_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_review_churn_result_di_v63
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,

    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d

-- **创建时间: 2023-11-22
-- **代码描述: DWS层inventory按region_day汇总v59
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: wuqiang wuqiang@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_inventory_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_region_day_di_v59
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_region_day_di_v59
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    region_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_inventory_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 1) AND '${dt}'
  AND region_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY region_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设

-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================

-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_logistics_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_logistics_category_insight_di_v38
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_logistics_category_insight_di_v38
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,

        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_logistics_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_performance_result_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** app_ec.app_ec_user_campaign_report_di_v24
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE app_ec.app_ec_user_campaign_report_di_v24
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    user_id,
    vip_level,
    gender,
    age_range,
    order_cnt,
    order_amount,
    pay_amount,
    pay_success_cnt,
    success_rate,
    net_amount,
    avg_order_amount,
    -- 排名
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pay_amount DESC)    AS rank_by_pay,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY order_cnt   DESC)   AS rank_by_order,
    -- 分层标签
    CASE
        WHEN pay_amount >= 5000 THEN 'S级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 1000 THEN 'A级'
        WHEN pay_amount >= 300  THEN 'B级'
        WHEN pay_amount > 0     THEN 'C级'
        ELSE 'N级'
    END                                            AS user_tier,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dm_ec.dwa_ec_user_performance_result_di
WHERE dt = '${dt}'
  AND user_id IS NOT NULL;

-- **创建时间: 2023-08-17
-- **代码描述: DWS层ad_click按category_week汇总v51
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: songbo songbo@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_ad_click_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_ad_click_category_week_di_v51
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_ad_click_category_week_di_v51
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    category_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_ad_click_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND category_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY category_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;

-- ** dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_retention_result_di_v53
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.auto.convert.join=true;
SET hive.optimize.skewjoin=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dm_ec.dwa_ec_order_retention_result_di_v53
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    d.user_id,
    d.vip_level,
    d.gender,
    d.age_range,
    NVL(o.record_cnt,    0)                        AS order_cnt,
    NVL(o.total_amount,  0)                        AS order_amount,
    NVL(o.success_cnt,   0)                        AS success_cnt,
    NVL(o.avg_amount,    0)                        AS avg_order_amount,
    NVL(p.total_amount,  0)                        AS pay_amount,
    NVL(p.success_cnt,   0)                        AS pay_success_cnt,

         THEN NVL(o.success_cnt, 0) * 1.0 / o.record_cnt
         ELSE 0
    END                                            AS success_rate,
    NVL(o.total_amount, 0) - NVL(p.total_amount, 0) AS net_amount,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da d
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_order_user_day_di o ON d.user_id = o.user_id AND o.dt = '${dt}'
LEFT JOIN dw_ec.dws_ec_order_shop_day_di p ON d.user_id = p.user_id AND p.dt = '${dt}'
WHERE d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_shop_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}');

FROM ods_ec.ods_ec_shop_di t
LEFT JOIN dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da d
       ON t.region_id = d.region_id
      AND d.dt = (SELECT MAX(dt) FROM dim_ec.dim_ec_user_da WHERE dt <= '${dt}')
WHERE t.dt = '${dt}'
  AND t.id IS NOT NULL;

-- =========================================================================
-- **创建人: hexin hexin@ecommerce.com
-- **创建时间: 2023-06-25
-- **代码描述: DWS层inventory按shop_week汇总v87
-- **涉及需求: 电商数仓自动化建设
-- **维护人: hexin hexin@ecommerce.com
-- **修改历史:
-- **
-- ===================META BEGIN=============================================
-- **依赖表列表:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dwd_ec_inventory_basic_di
-- **OUTPUT TABLE:
-- **
-- ** dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_week_di_v87
-- **
-- ===================META END===============================================

SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition=true;
SET hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode=nonstrict;
SET hive.exec.parallel=true;
SET hive.map.aggr=true;
SET hive.groupby.skewindata=true;

INSERT OVERWRITE TABLE dw_ec.dws_ec_inventory_shop_week_di_v87
PARTITION (dt = '${dt}')
SELECT
    shop_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT id)                             AS record_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id)                        AS user_cnt,
    SUM(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS total_amount,
    AVG(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS avg_amount,
    MAX(NVL(amount, 0))                            AS max_amount,
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount END)      AS min_positive_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS success_cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  AS fail_cnt,
    COUNT(DISTINCT platform)                       AS platform_cnt,
    MAX(create_time)                               AS last_action_time,
    MIN(create_time)                               AS first_action_time,
    '${dt}'                                      AS dt
FROM dw_ec.dwd_ec_inventory_basic_di
WHERE dt BETWEEN DATE_SUB('${dt}', 7) AND '${dt}'
  AND shop_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY shop_id
HAVING COUNT(1) > 0;
